master_prompt:
Clean editorial vector ink illustration.

Minimalist Japanese-inspired systems aesthetic.

Bust portrait only.

Centred composition.

Strong whitespace.

Monochrome dominant.

Off-white or pure white background.

Thin black ink linework.

Fine editorial hatching only.

No painterly rendering.

No photorealism.

No cinematic lighting.

No gradients.

No 3D shading.

No textured backgrounds.

No dramatic contrast.

Minimal facial detail using simplified geometry.

Eyes, nose and mouth lightly implied.

Hair treated as grouped ink masses.

Facial hair treated as simplified grouped ink masses and sparse editorial hatching only.

No realistic beard texture.

No realistic skin texture.

No glossy surfaces.

Clothing lightly shaded with sparse ink hatching only.

No filled clothing colours.

Accent colour used VERY sparingly as subtle clothing shading accents only.

Accent colour may appear only in:
- inner collar shading
- blazer fold accents
- knitwear hatch shading
- tiny fabric edge details
- pocket seam or lapel edge accents

Accent colour must remain muted and restrained.

Clothing remains predominantly monochrome.

Portrait should feel symbolic rather than realistic.

Professional LinkedIn editorial portrait posture.

Calm executive presence.

Subtle business-casual wardrobe.

No symbols.

No orbit systems.

No icons.

No floating UI elements.

No infographic composition.

No dashboard aesthetics.

No visual metaphors surrounding the character.

No typography.

No split layouts.

No bottom divider line.

Portrait only.

Telegram profile-picture safe.

Quiet, calm, intelligent visual tone.

Editorial illustration quality.

Controlled detail density.

High detail ONLY in:
- hair clusters
- glasses
- beard silhouette where relevant
- subtle facial edges

Low detail everywhere else.

Large negative space.

Thin consistent vector-clean line weight.

No sketchiness.

No rough comic lines.

The image should feel:
- calm
- composed
- observant
- editorial
- modern
- intelligent
- minimal
- high-trust

Avoid:
photorealistic, cinematic lighting, painterly, oil painting, anime, comic book, cyberpunk, 3D render, glossy skin, dramatic shadows, infographic board, dashboard UI, typography, text labels, colourful clothing, realism, concept art, hyperdetail, videogame art, movie poster, fantasy illustration, realistic beard texture, detailed skin pores, HDR, high contrast, dynamic action pose, cluttered composition, busy background, neon, gradients, split layout, tech HUD, sci-fi interface, symbols, icons, orbit, dotted arcs, surrounding diagrams
usage_note: For each image, combine master_prompt with exactly one character profile. For Adnan, use the reference photo only for likeness and silhouette, not as a 1:1 portrait. No characters should have symbols, orbits, icons, floating diagrams, or infographic elements.

characters.name: Adnan
characters.title: Human
characters.purpose: Guides strategic direction, synthesises outcomes, presents narratives and validates decisions
visual_presence: recognisable from reference photo but not realistic
characters.wardrobe: Minimal business-casual blazer or zip-collar executive knitwear; monochrome dominant; no coloured clothing; accent colour only as sparse hatch shading or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Tall clean silhouette, open approachable stance, symmetrical framing, minimal movement.
characters.facial_features: Glasses, full beard, balding with clean side hair, strong brow structure, warm intelligent presence. Use reference photo for likeness and silhouette only, not a 1:1 portrait.
characters.hair: Controlled grouped ink masses; balding crown with clean side hair; simplified, not realistic texture.

characters.name: Larry
characters.title: Orchestrator
characters.purpose: Routes requests, coordinates specialists, synthesises outputs
characters.wardrobe: Clean business-casual blazer or structured knitwear; monochrome dominant; muted gold only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Balanced symmetrical silhouette, stable shoulders, minimal movement.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, tidy professional styling, optional glasses if useful for intellectual presence.
characters.hair: Grouped ink masses, clean professional shape.

characters.name: Nolan
characters.title: HR
characters.purpose: Manages specialist lifecycle, onboarding, retirement and team hygiene
characters.wardrobe: Soft business-casual jacket or cardigan over shirt; monochrome dominant; warm brick only as sparse clothing hatch shading or small trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Friendly rounded posture with stable stance; professional, not playful.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, warm brow, calm presence.
characters.hair: Short grouped ink masses, simple and low detail.

characters.name: Pax
characters.title: Researcher
characters.purpose: Cross-source verification, fact-checking and structured intelligence gathering
characters.wardrobe: Crisp shirt, blazer or simple knit layer; monochrome dominant; dusty blue only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Slightly angular inquisitive silhouette without dynamic action.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, attentive eyes, composed mouth.
characters.hair: Controlled grouped ink masses, clean and simple.

characters.name: Penn
characters.title: Journal Writer
characters.purpose: Transforms raw inputs into structured journal and knowledge artefacts
posture: hands calm or mostly out of frame
characters.wardrobe: Soft blouse, cardigan or minimal blazer; monochrome dominant; dusty lavender only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Soft flowing lines, relaxed professional posture.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, gentle facial geometry.
characters.hair: Grouped ink masses with soft flowing shape, low texture.

characters.name: Mack
characters.title: Automation Specialist
characters.purpose: Builds automations, APIs, webhooks and external execution pipelines
characters.wardrobe: Modern casual jacket or workwear-inspired blazer; monochrome dominant; electric orange only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details, kept muted.
characters.silhouette_notes: Slightly asymmetrical but stable professional silhouette; no walking or motion.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, practical focused presence.
characters.hair: Grouped ink masses, clean but slightly informal.

characters.name: Silas
characters.title: Database Architect
characters.purpose: Maintains schema integrity, imports knowledge and audits structure
posture: hands restrained or out of frame
characters.gaze: slightly off-camera — looking to the side, NOT directly at the viewer
characters.wardrobe: Structured blazer or high-collar knitwear; monochrome dominant; cool steel only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Rectilinear grounded silhouette with strong symmetry.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, strong geometric face shape.
characters.hair: Neat grouped ink masses, controlled and low detail.

characters.name: Coda
characters.title: Deck Author
characters.purpose: Transforms research and arguments into persuasive presentation decks
characters.wardrobe: Elegant blazer, blouse or tailored knitwear; monochrome dominant; deep indigo only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Elegant upper body line flow, professional and minimal.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, refined editorial geometry.
characters.hair: Controlled grouped ink masses with elegant flow.

characters.name: Rex
characters.title: Logic Auditor
characters.purpose: Finds gaps, non-sequiturs and weak reasoning
posture: arms relaxed or lightly folded but not aggressive
characters.wardrobe: Sharp blazer or structured shirt; monochrome dominant; crimson only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Sharp angular silhouette, rigid but professional posture.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, distinct angular face structure, composed intensity.
characters.hair: Short grouped ink masses, clean geometric outline.

characters.name: Vera
characters.title: Adversarial Critic
posture: upright posture with slight head tilt
characters.wardrobe: Minimal blazer or structured top; monochrome dominant; acid green only as very sparse muted clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Subtle asymmetry only; professional, not chaotic.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, sharp but restrained facial geometry.
characters.hair: Grouped ink masses with controlled shape.

characters.name: Aria
characters.title: Audience Persona Specialist
characters.purpose: Optimises messaging for audience resonance and behavioural response
characters.wardrobe: Elegant professional clothing with hijab; monochrome dominant; warm rose only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details, not as full hijab colour.
characters.silhouette_notes: Fluid approachable silhouette with soft curves and professional framing.
characters.appearance_note: Wears a hijab/headscarf; elegant, composed, professional; hijab remains mostly monochrome with only tiny warm rose hatch accents.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, calm attentive presence.
characters.hair: Covered by hijab; no visible hair required.

characters.name: Iris
characters.title: Image Prompt Specialist
characters.purpose: Designs structured prompts for image generation systems
posture: hands calm or mostly out of frame
characters.wardrobe: Minimal creative-professional jacket, blouse or knitwear; monochrome dominant; warm amber only as sparse clothing hatching or tiny trim details.
characters.silhouette_notes: Dreamlike elegance reduced into a stable professional portrait silhouette.
characters.facial_features: Minimal facial detail, expressive but restrained eyes.
characters.hair: Grouped ink masses with controlled flowing form.
